objectives.description: Develop and submit personal performance contract with clearly defined (SMART) targets aligned to SERVICOM and unit objectives

kpis.description: Timely submission of performance contract (within approved timeline)

objectives.description: Participate in PMS trainings and capacity-building sessions to enhance understanding of PMS processes

kpis.description: Percentage of assigned PMS trainings attended

objectives.description: Complete and submit quarterly self-appraisal reports within approved timelines

kpis.description: Percentage of quarterly appraisals submitted on time

objectives.description: Engage in periodic performance review discussions with supervisor and implement feedback

kpis.description: Number of review sessions attended and feedback implemented

objectives.description: Maintain accurate personal performance records and supporting evidence for appraisal

kpis.description: Completeness of appraisal documentation (no gaps/errors)

objectives.description: Scan and digitize physical records into electronic formats

kpis.description: Percentage of targeted records digitized

objectives.description: Ensure secure storage and backup of digitized records

kpis.description: Percentage of records backed up successfully

kpis.description: Percentage of records updated and retrievable within required time

kpis.description: Percentage of requests attended to within agreed timeframe

objectives.description: Generate periodic registry reports

kpis.description: Percentage of reports submitted on schedule

objectives.description: Identify gaps or inefficiencies in existing service delivery processes

kpis.description: Percentage of service processes reviewed vs total assigned

objectives.description: Identify areas for service improvement within the unit or agency

kpis.description: Number of improvement opportunities identified

objectives.description: Identify and prioritize routine processes for automation

kpis.description: Number of Processes, Forms, and Tasks Identified for Automation

objectives.description: Use official email for all formal communication, submission of media content, and correspondence

kpis.description: Percentage of assigned training sessions attended

objectives.description: Participate in staff recognition programs, award ceremonies, and motivational events

objectives.description: Strengthen and institutionalize the effective utilization of the Performance Management System (PMS) to enhance accountability, performance tracking, and service delivery outcomes across SERVICOM.

Percentage of performance reviews and appraisals completed within approved PMS timelines.
